description: The provider-frame {"tool_calls": [...]} wrapper serialized whole into content, carrying a hallucinated (unknown-name) shape-A call with string-encoded arguments. Provenance: PR #55 code review, detector-gap family (3) verified by execution -- the wrapper key hid the inner call from shape A/B matching, so the frame passed both seams raw. Fixed by unwrapping the tool_calls list before detection; the unknown tool can neither execute nor recover, so the leak is suppressed to the fallback.
